item.title: INFRA: App Store Purchase and Receipt Validation
item.intent: The $9.99 one-time purchase must just work — StoreKit handles it, we validate the receipt, done.
item.description: Per D-BIZ-1 and D-BIZ-2. Implement StoreKit 2 for the one-time $9.99 app purchase. Receipt validation for purchase verification. Handles: purchase flow, restore purchases, family sharing eligibility. The app must be fully functional after purchase with no additional gates.
acceptanceCriteria: User can purchase the app for $9.99 via standard App Store flow
Restore purchases works for users who reinstall or switch devices
No additional purchase gates after the initial $9.99 for non-Pro features
